reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
The ladies' bathroom is spacious, with toilet paper, liquid hand soap, and paper towels.

reviews.comment:
Habitualmente paramos aquí camino hacia la costa atlántica, tiene un lindo predio arbolado. Los sanitarios siempre muy bien. Ofrecen agua caliente para el mate gratis!

(Translated by Google)
We often stop here on our way to the Atlantic coast; it has a lovely wooded area. The restrooms are always great. They offer free hot water for mate!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURQOE95azRRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Baños bien. Poca mercadería. El Acá debería tenerlo en mejores condiciones, parece que no importa. Ahora se agregaron los pozos en la entrada.una lastima que el club no lo mantenga bien a un lugar arbolado, que hay pocos.

(Translated by Google)
Bathrooms are fine. Limited merchandise. The club should keep it in better condition; it seems they don't care. Now they've added potholes at the entrance. It's a shame the club doesn't maintain this wooded area properly, as there are few of those left.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURsdVpIUUxnEAE
